untranslatable_reason: Signal requires external data not in allowed indicators: (1) inventory levels and percentile ranking vs 2-year range, (2) production pipeline lead time in days, (3) storage cost as percentage of commodity price. These require fundamental/supply-chain data unavailable in price/technical indicators. Approximated demand volatility using hvol_20 and price position using price_pos_20, but core inventory imbalance and pipeline lag conditions cannot be expressed with allowed indicators.
translation_notes: Attempted partial translation: Used price_pos_20 < 0.5 to approximate 'inventory below 50th percentile' (relative price weakness), and hvol_20 > 0.25 to approximate 'demand volatility coefficient >0.25'. Exit condition maps to price_pos_20 > 0.6 representing ~10% recovery. However, this is a weak proxy—the signal fundamentally requires inventory curve data, supply pipeline information, and commodity storage cost data that are not available in the allowed technical indicator set. Backtest engine would need external data feed integration.
